rule.field_name: Last date for submission of applications
rule.source_sentence: The last date for submission of applications by the selected meritorious students on the National Scholarship Portal (NSP) for National Means cum Merit Scholarship Scheme (NMMSS) for the year 2025-26 has been extended to 30th September 2025.
rule.confidence_reason: The previous last date for submission is not explicitly mentioned, only that it 'has been extended'.

systems.display_name: NSP Portal FAQ (illustrative — real text not sourced yet)
systems.current_text: Applications must be submitted by 31st August 2025.
